_comment: Template for the MAGI node's MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers.
Copy this file to mcp.json in your workspace root and edit the entries;
the MCP loader falls back to this template if mcp.json is missing.
Each entry under mcpServers becomes one upstream server. Disabled entries
(set "disabled": true) are skipped on boot. The loader never fails — a
broken server just leaves the rest of the registry intact.
stdio            command + args (a local subprocess). Default.
sse              server-sent events over HTTP (older transport).

fetch._comment: Example: uvx-installed web fetch server (uncomment to enable).
